case_title: OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JONATAS CALACIO COSTA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSTA, JONATAS CALACIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS--LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
